MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Cross-Defendant Institute On Aging's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories and Request For Production of Documents is granted. The objections to Form Interrogatory 15.1 are ordered stricken, and Cross-Defendant is ordered to respond further. The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory 17.1 is granted. As to the Requests for Production Nos. 1, the objections, except for privilege, are ordered stricken. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity.
The motion is granted as to No. 3. The response must be separate and cannot be made be reference to any other response. Any objections, except for privilege, are ordered stricken. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity.
The motion is granted as to No. 5 as Cross-Defendant is ordered to identify with particularity any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege. The motion is granted as to Nos. 6 and 7.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
